items.title: After Seven Years, First U.S. Direct Flight Lands in Caracas
items.summary: President Trump banned commercial flights to Venezuela during his first term, but the flights are the latest step in re-establishing ties between the two countries.

items.title: Israel intercepts Gaza flotilla near Crete and detains 175 activists
items.summary: Pro-Palestinian activists say 22 boats carrying aid for Gaza were illegally intercepted in international waters near the Greek island.
